rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS WALKER et al VS. PLATINUM CAPITAL GROUP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Based On International Destruction Of Evidence; P&A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October. 24, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT AURORA LOAN SERVICES' Motion For Terminating Sanctions Based On International Destruction Of Evidence. Continued to October 26 at 9:00am to be heard by Judge Douglas in Dept. 303. Opposing Party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Dept. 501 no later than 4pm Oct. 24, 2012. Defendant to bring in proposed order from Oct. 19, 2012 hearing. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL PAGE VS. BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION/ CT CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October. 24, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege formation and terms of binding contract between parties. Plaintiff's performance and defendants' specific breach of contract. Prevailing party prepare order and submit within 30 days. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CRISTOBAL HERNANDEZ VS. CITIMORTGAGE, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October. 24, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANTS CITIMORTGAGE, INC., CR TITLE SERVICES, INC. and U.S. BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend all issues raised by demurrer. Prevailing party prepare order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TINA SOBERANIS, EXECUTOR OF THE ESTATE OF VS. KATHERINE GRIMME et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October. 24, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action 10th and 11th. 10th Breach of contract failed to set forth any terms re breach. 11th fails to specify part of CC 2924 breached and how breached. Sustain without leave to amend as to cause of action 12 CC 2923.5. Deed of trust dated September 2008 i.e. 2923.5 not applicable. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALAN HONNIBALL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October. 24, 2012. Line 5 - DEFENDANT JPMORGAN MORGAGE ACQUISITION CORP, 2005-WMC1's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend 2nd amended complaint to address all issues raised by demurrer.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEY RUSSELL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October. 24, 2012. Line 6 - Plaintiff Josey Russell's Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction. Hearing required to address compliance with CC 2923.5 per MABRY. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RALAN WONG VS. TIFFANY BARBER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Clarification Per Ccp 473(D)
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October. 24, 2012. Line 7 - DEFENDANT TIFFANY BARBER, SARAH SHARAF, MATT PINNA Notice Of Motion For Clarification Per Ccp 473(D). Deny - Defendant motion for summary judgment was denied upon court's finding of triable issue of material fact. No motion of summary adjudication before court. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HELEN LOWE VS. CELESTE AMAYA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October. 24, 2012. Line 8 - PLAINTIFF HELEN LOWE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant subject to opposition. =(501/REQ)
